task_completion.visual_evidence: The AttendHRM main application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: The Add Branch form is open
task_completion.visual_evidence: A window, dialog box, or tab specifically for adding or editing a branch is open within AttendHRM.

task_completion.description: Branch Name and Code are entered
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Downtown Office' is visible in the Branch Name field, and 'DTN' is visible in the Branch Code field.
The text '450 Market Street', 'San Francisco', 'CA', and '94105' are visible in the respective address, city, state, and zip code fields.

task_completion.description: Branch Phone and Email are entered
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text '415-555-0198' and 'downtown@meridian-solutions.com' are visible in the phone and email fields.

task_completion.description: The new branch is saved and visible in the system
task_completion.visual_evidence: The branch 'Downtown Office' is visible in the list of branches, or a success message confirming the branch creation is shown.

integrity.description: Agent used the AttendHRM GUI to add the branch
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the AttendHRM graphical interface. There should be no terminal windows open executing SQL commands or scripts to insert the data.

integrity.description: Inputs were entered into the actual AttendHRM application
integrity.visual_evidence: The form fields being filled clearly belong to the AttendHRM application, not a text editor, web browser, or notepad.

integrity.description: Agent did not manipulate the database directly
integrity.visual_evidence: No evidence of the agent using Firebird's isql.exe tool, PowerShell scripts, or other database management tools to bypass the UI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires adding a branch to AttendHRM Lite (Lenvica HRMS). Expected details: Name: 'Downtown Office', Code: 'DTN', Address: '450 Market Street', City: 'San Francisco', State: 'CA', Zip: '94105', Phone: '415-555-0198', Email: 'downtown@meridian-solutions.com'. The agent must use the AttendHRM GUI to enter these details. The system uses a Firebird database (DEMO.FDB), but direct database manipulation via terminal/isql.exe is considered cheating and should not be present in the screenshots.
